description: to "thump", i.e., cudgel or pummel (properly, with a stick or bastinado), but in any case by repeated blows; thus differing from g3817 and g3960, which denote a (usually single) blow with the hand or any instrument, or g4141 with the fist (or a hammer), or g4474 with the palm; as well as from g5177, an accidental collision); by implication, to punish; figuratively, to offend (the conscience)
origin: a primary verb (in a strengthened form)
